details: clipboard+=unnamedplus uses the OS clipboard
clipboard+=ideaput uses IDE paste for put
:source ~/.ideavimrc reloads your config
Test mappings without an IDE restart
:action ToggleIdeaVim toggles it
Useful when keys conflict
:action ReformatCode is one example
Use <Action>(...) in mappings instead
:actionlist extract filters by name
Use it before mapping IDE actions
Use :set trackactionids
IdeaVim shows the action ID in notices

tips.summary: Use IDE smart join with :set ideajoin
details: Then J uses the IDE smart join
Useful when syntax should be adjusted

tips.summary: Stop rename from forcing Select mode
details: Use :set idearefactormode=keep
Useful when IDE rename interrupts your normal Vim mode flow
A-Z marks sync to IDE bookmarks
Useful for cross-file jumping
Use :set ideawrite=all
Useful when you want :w to trigger IDE save hooks
:set lookupkeys? shows the keys it keeps
Use it when Tab or Enter act oddly

tips.summary: Open IdeaVim Tutor from the status bar
details: Click the Vim indicator in the IDE status bar
Choose Tutor from that menu
K opens the IDE quick docs popup
Works on any symbol in Normal mode
Use Ctrl-Space in Insert mode
Press it again to widen suggestions
